auth_boot_error_fallback: Zenii failed to start. Check the logs for errors.
auth_connect_description: Enter your gateway authentication token to connect.
auth_connection_failed: Cannot reach Zenii at {url}. Check that the daemon is running.
auth_connection_failed_error: Could not connect to daemon. Check the token and ensure the daemon is running.
channel_slack_app_token_placeholder: xapp-... App-Level Token for Socket Mode
chat_configure_provider_placeholder: Configure a provider to start chatting...
chat_empty_description: Send a message to begin chatting with Zenii
chat_error_no_provider_suffix: to set up a provider and model.
chat_no_api_key_warning: No API key found — your key may not have persisted across restarts.
inbox_select_conversation: Select a conversation to view messages
memory_delete_confirm_description: This will permanently remove this memory entry.
memory_empty_no_results_default: No memories yet. Add one or chat with the agent to build memory.
memory_learned_observations_description: Facts the agent has learned about you from conversations.
onboarding_channels_description: Optionally connect messaging channels like Telegram, Slack, or Discord so Zenii can reach you there. You can skip this and set them up later in Settings.
onboarding_default_model_description: Select the AI model Zenii will use by default. You can always switch models later in the chat toolbar.
onboarding_description: Let's get you set up so you can start chatting.
onboarding_disclaimer_text: Zenii uses large language models (LLMs) to generate responses and can execute system-level actions (shell commands, file operations) on your behalf. LLM outputs may be inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate. System actions run with your user permissions. Always review AI-suggested actions before confirming. Use at your own risk.
onboarding_profile_description: Tell Zenii a bit about yourself so it can give you personalized, context-aware responses.
onboarding_provider_add_hint: Need a different provider? Any OpenAI API-compatible service can be added via the + Add Provider button above the list.
onboarding_provider_description: Add an API key for at least one provider to enable chat. Expand a provider below, enter your key, and save it.
onboarding_timezone_hint: Auto-detected from your system. Edit if incorrect.
schedule_delete_confirm_description: This will permanently remove this scheduled job.
schedule_empty_description: Create a job to automate tasks on a schedule.
schedule_validation_channel_required: Channel is required for send via channel
schedule_validation_cron_fields: Cron expression must have 5 or 6 space-separated fields
schedule_validation_date_time_future: Date and time must be in the future
schedule_validation_date_time_required: Both date and time are required
schedule_validation_message_channel_requ: Message is required for send via channel
schedule_validation_prompt_required: Prompt is required for agent turn
session_delete_confirm_description: This will permanently delete this chat and all its messages.
settings_about_disclaimer_body: Zenii uses large language models (LLMs) to generate responses and can execute system-level actions (shell commands, file operations) on your behalf. LLM outputs may be inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate. System actions run with your user permissions. Always review AI-suggested actions before confirming. Use at your own risk.
settings_channels_confirm_remove_descrip: This will remove the stored credential for this channel.
settings_channels_test_passed_connect_fa: Test passed but connection failed. Check backend logs.
settings_config_description: Raw TOML configuration — edit directly on disk or use settings above
settings_embeddings_disabled_message: Semantic search is disabled. Select a provider to enable.
settings_embeddings_openai_description: Uses your OpenAI API key from Settings > Providers
settings_embeddings_openai_key_required: OpenAI API key is required. Add it in Settings > Providers.
settings_embeddings_provider_description: Choose how semantic embeddings are generated for memory search
settings_general_agent_features_descript: Toggle context injection and self-evolution at runtime
settings_general_compact_prompts_descrip: Uses compact axiom-based preamble instead of verbose prose. Reduces token usage by ~60-80% while maintaining response quality.
settings_general_context_injection_descr: Prepends identity files, soul, persona, environment details, and user profile into every agent prompt. Provides richer, more personalized responses at the cost of additional input tokens per message.
settings_general_context_strategy_descri: Controls how much conversation history and memory is injected
settings_general_max_preamble_tokens_des: Token budget for system preamble. Overflow trims lowest-priority context.
settings_general_notifications_descripti: Choose how you receive notifications for each event type
settings_general_profile_description: Personalize your experience and help the AI give context-aware responses
settings_general_self_evolution_descript: Agent observes your preferences and usage patterns to store learnings, refine its behavior over time, and propose skill updates. Uses additional tokens for observation analysis and memory writes.
settings_general_url_error: Invalid URL. Must be a valid http:// or https:// address.
settings_notifications_description: Configure where notifications are delivered for each event type.
settings_permissions_footer: Local surfaces (Desktop, CLI, TUI) have all tools enabled by default. Remote channels deny high-risk tools by default.
settings_permissions_no_tools: No tools registered. Start the daemon to see available tools.
settings_permissions_subtitle: Configure which tools are available on each surface
settings_persona_confirm_delete_descript: This will permanently delete this skill.
settings_plugins_confirm_remove_descript: This will uninstall the plugin and remove all its files.
settings_plugins_no_official: No plugins found in official repository.
settings_providers_confirm_delete_model_: This will remove this custom model from the provider.
settings_providers_confirm_delete_provid: This will permanently delete this provider and all its models.
settings_providers_confirm_remove_key_de: This will remove the stored API key for this provider.
settings_providers_custom_hint: Need a different provider? Any OpenAI API-compatible service can be added via the + Add Provider button above the list.
settings_providers_default_model_descrip: The model Zenii uses by default. You can override this per-conversation in the chat toolbar.
settings_providers_instructions: Add an API key for at least one provider to enable chat. Expand a provider below, enter your key, and save it.
settings_providers_missing_key_detail: but no API key is configured for that provider. Add a key below or select a different default model.
settings_providers_missing_key_warning: No API key for default provider.
settings_providers_no_providers: No providers found. Is the daemon running?
workflows_delete_confirm_description: This will permanently remove this workflow and its run history.
workflows_empty_description: Create a workflow to orchestrate multi-step tasks.
workflows_toml_placeholder:
id = "my-workflow"
name = "My Workflow"
description = "A sample workflow"

[[steps]]
name = "check-system"
type = "tool"
tool = "system_info"

[steps.args]
action = "os"
wb_code_readonly_notice: Read-only. Edit nodes in the visual builder.
wb_import_dialog_description: Select a .toml workflow file to import.
wb_unsaved_confirm_desc: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
wb_node_trigger_cron_description: Trigger this workflow on a cron schedule
wb_node_trigger_manual_description: Trigger this workflow manually on demand
wb_node_llm_description: Send a prompt to a language model and capture the response
wb_node_agent_turn_description: Run a full agentic conversation turn with tool access
wb_node_web_search_description: Search the web and return results
wb_node_system_info_description: Retrieve system information (CPU, memory, disk, etc.)
wb_node_shell_description: Execute a shell command and capture its output
wb_node_process_description: List, find, or kill running processes
wb_node_file_read_description: Read the contents of a file
wb_node_file_search_description: Search for files matching a pattern
wb_node_patch_description: Apply a text replacement patch to a file
wb_node_memory_store_description: Save a piece of information to agent memory
wb_node_memory_recall_description: Search and retrieve entries from agent memory
wb_node_memory_forget_description: Delete an entry from agent memory by ID
wb_node_channel_send_description: Send a message to a configured messaging channel
wb_node_toggle_job_description: Enable or disable an existing scheduled job
wb_node_delay_description: Pause workflow execution for a number of seconds
wb_node_condition_description: Branch workflow execution based on an expression
wb_field_prompt_description: Prompt text sent to the model. Use {{steps.X.output}} for step references.
wb_field_agent_prompt_description: Prompt for the agent turn. The agent has access to all registered tools.
wb_field_model_description: Override the default model for this step only
wb_field_session_target_description: Whether to use the main session or an isolated one
wb_field_recall_query_description: Text or semantic query to search agent memory
wb_field_max_results_description: Maximum number of search results to return
wb_field_file_search_max_results_descrip: Maximum number of file search results to return
wb_field_sysinfo_action_description: Which system information category to retrieve
wb_field_timeout_secs_description: Maximum time to wait for the command to complete
wb_field_process_target_description: Process name or PID for find/kill actions
wb_field_file_read_path_description: Path to the file to read
wb_field_file_write_path_description: Path to the file to write
wb_field_patch_path_description: Path to the file to patch
wb_field_file_list_path_description: Path to the directory to list
wb_field_search_path_description: Base directory for the file search
wb_field_file_content_description: The content to write to the file
wb_field_memory_store_content_descriptio: The content to save to agent memory
wb_field_search_pattern_description: File search pattern (supports glob and regex)
wb_field_original_description: The exact text that will be replaced
wb_field_replacement_description: The text to insert in place of the original
wb_field_tags_description: Optional tags for categorizing the memory entry
wb_field_recall_limit_description: Maximum number of memory entries to return
wb_field_memory_id_description: The unique ID of the memory entry to delete
wb_field_channel_description: Name of the messaging channel to send to
wb_field_notify_body_description: Optional body text for the notification
wb_field_config_key_description: The whitelisted configuration key to read or update
wb_field_config_value_description: The new value to set for the configuration key
wb_field_job_name_description: Unique name for the scheduled job
wb_field_toggle_job_name_description: Name of the job to enable or disable
wb_field_schedule_description: Cron schedule for when to run the job
wb_field_payload_type_description: The type of action the job will execute
wb_field_enabled_description: Whether the job should be enabled (true) or disabled (false)
wb_field_delay_seconds_description: Number of seconds to pause before continuing
wb_field_expression_description: Boolean expression evaluated to determine the branch
wb_field_if_true_description: Step to execute when the expression evaluates to true
wb_field_if_false_description: Step to execute when the expression evaluates to false
wiki_ingest_filename_hint: Use a path like concepts/, entities/, topics/, comparisons/, or queries/
wiki_ingest_drop_hint: Click or drag to add files
wiki_graph_empty: No pages to show in graph
wiki_select_page_hint: Choose from the list on the left
wiki_query_placeholder: Ask a question about your wiki...
wiki_sources_delete_confirm_body: All wiki pages derived exclusively from "{filename}" will be deleted. Pages shared with other sources will be rebuilt.
wiki_regenerate_confirm_body: This re-runs the LLM over all sources using the current INGEST_PROMPT.md. User-saved query pages are preserved. This may take several minutes.
